Variable.Name: Message
Variable.Assignment: $"[{k_StarterAssetsSampleName}] Interaction Layer {k_TeleportLayerIndex} should be set to '{k_TeleportLayerName}' for teleportation locomotion."

Variable.Name: FixItMessage
Variable.Assignment: $"XR Interaction Toolkit samples reserve Interaction Layer {k_TeleportLayerIndex} for teleportation locomotion. Set Interaction Layer {k_TeleportLayerIndex} to '{k_TeleportLayerName}' to prevent conflicts."

Variable.Name: HelpText
Variable.Assignment: "Please note Interaction Layers are unique to the XR Interaction Toolkit and can be found in Edit > Project Settings > XR Plug-in Management > XR Interaction Toolkit"

Variable.Name: $"[{k_StarterAssetsSampleName}] Interaction Layer {k_TeleportLayerIndex} should be set to '{k_TeleportLayerName}' for teleportation locomotion."

$"XR Interaction Toolkit samples reserve Interaction Layer {k_TeleportLayerIndex} for teleportation locomotion. Set Interaction Layer {k_TeleportLayerIndex} to '{k_TeleportLayerName}' to prevent conflicts."

Variable.Value: "Please note Interaction Layers are unique to the XR Interaction Toolkit and can be found in Edit > Project Settings > XR Plug-in Management > XR Interaction Toolkit"

Arguments.Argument: $"Interaction Layer {k_TeleportLayerIndex} for teleportation locomotion is currently set to '{InteractionLayerSettings.Instance.GetLayerNameAt(k_TeleportLayerIndex)}' instead of '{k_TeleportLayerName}'"

$"Interaction Layer {k_TeleportLayerIndex} for teleportation locomotion is currently set to '{InteractionLayerSettings.Instance.GetLayerNameAt(k_TeleportLayerIndex)}' instead of '{k_TeleportLayerName}'"

ReturnStatement.Statement:
EditorUtility.DisplayDialog(
                "Fixing Teleport Interaction Layer",
                $"Interaction Layer {k_TeleportLayerIndex} for teleportation locomotion is currently set to '{InteractionLayerSettings.Instance.GetLayerNameAt(k_TeleportLayerIndex)}' instead of '{k_TeleportLayerName}'",
                "Automatically Replace",
                "Cancel")

Arguments.Argument: "Missing required Manipulation Interaction Group reference. Use the Inspector window to assign the XR Interaction Group component reference."

Fields.Name: m_ManipulationInteractionGroup
Attributes: Tooltip("The GameObject containing the interaction group used for direct and distant manipulation.")

Fields.Name: m_DirectInteractor
Attributes: Tooltip("The GameObject containing the interactor used for direct manipulation.")

Fields.Name: m_RayInteractor
Attributes: Tooltip("The GameObject containing the interactor used for distant/ray manipulation.")

Fields.Name: m_TeleportInteractor
Attributes: Tooltip("The GameObject containing the interactor used for teleportation.")

Fields.Name: m_TeleportModeActivate
Attributes: Tooltip("The reference to the action to start the teleport aiming mode for this controller.")

Fields.Name: m_TeleportModeCancel
Attributes: Tooltip("The reference to the action to cancel the teleport aiming mode for this controller.")

Fields.Name: m_Turn
Attributes: Tooltip("The reference to the action of continuous turning the XR Origin with this controller.")

Fields.Name: m_SnapTurn
Attributes: Tooltip("The reference to the action of snap turning the XR Origin with this controller.")

Fields.Name: m_Move
Attributes: Tooltip("The reference to the action of moving the XR Origin with this controller.")

Fields.Name: m_UIScroll
Attributes: Tooltip("The reference to the action of scrolling UI with this controller.")

Fields.Name: m_SmoothMotionEnabled
Attributes: Tooltip("If true, continuous movement will be enabled. If false, teleport will enabled.")

Fields.Name: m_SmoothTurnEnabled
Attributes: Tooltip("If true, continuous turn will be enabled. If false, snap turn will be enabled. Note: If smooth motion is enabled and enable strafe is enabled on the continuous move provider, turn will be overriden in favor of strafe.")

Fields.Name: m_UIScrollingEnabled
Attributes: Tooltip("If true, UI scrolling will be enabled.")

Variable.Name: m_CombinedTransform
Variable.Assignment: new GameObject("[Dynamic Move Provider] Combined Forward Source").transform

Variable.Name: new GameObject("[Dynamic Move Provider] Combined Forward Source").transform

Fields.Name: m_HeadTransform
Attributes: Tooltip("Directs the XR Origin's movement when using the head-relative mode. If not set, will automatically find and use the XR Origin Camera.")

Fields.Name: m_LeftControllerTransform
Attributes: Tooltip("Directs the XR Origin's movement when using the hand-relative mode with the left hand.")

Fields.Name: m_RightControllerTransform
Attributes: Tooltip("Directs the XR Origin's movement when using the hand-relative mode with the right hand.")

Fields.Name: m_LeftHandMovementDirection
Attributes: Tooltip("Whether to use the specified head transform or left controller transform to direct the XR Origin's movement for the left hand.")

Fields.Name: m_RightHandMovementDirection
Attributes: Tooltip("Whether to use the specified head transform or right controller transform to direct the XR Origin's movement for the right hand.")

Arguments.Argument: $"Could not find a device that supports eye tracking on Awake. {this} has subscribed to device connected events and will activate the GameObject when an eye tracking device is connected."

Fields.Name: m_FallbackIfEyeTrackingUnavailable
Attributes: Tooltip("Enable fallback to head tracking if eye tracking is unavailable.")

Arguments.Argument: $"Missing Poke Follow Transform assignment on {this}. Disabling component."

Variable.Name: applyFollow
Variable.Assignment:
m_ApplyIfChildIsTarget
                ? pokeTarget != null && pokeTarget.IsChildOf(transform)
                : pokeTarget == transform

Fields.Name: m_PokeFollowTransform
Attributes:
Tooltip("Transform that will move in the poke direction when this or a parent GameObject is poked." +
                 "\nNote: Should be a direct child GameObject.")

Fields.Name: m_SmoothingSpeed
Attributes: Tooltip("Multiplies transform position interpolation as a factor of Time.deltaTime. If 0, no smoothing will be applied.")

Fields.Name: m_ReturnToInitialPosition
Attributes: Tooltip("When this component is no longer the target of the poke, the Poke Follow Transform returns to the original position.")

Fields.Name: m_ApplyIfChildIsTarget
Attributes:
Tooltip("Whether to apply the follow animation if the target of the poke is a child of this transform. " +
                 "This is useful for UI objects that may have child graphics.")

Fields.Name: m_ClampToMaxDistance
Attributes: Tooltip("Whether to keep the Poke Follow Transform from moving past a maximum distance from the poke target.")

Fields.Name: m_MaxDistance
Attributes: Tooltip("The maximum distance from this transform that the Poke Follow Transform can move.")

Arguments.Argument: "Missing required Text component reference. Use the Inspector window to assign which Text component to increment."

Fields.Name: m_Text
Attributes: Tooltip("The Text component this behavior uses to display the incremented value.")

Arguments.Argument: m_ArrowHeight.PlaySequence(arrowPosition, new float3(arrowPosition.x, m_TargetArrowHeight, arrowPosition.z), m_ArrowAnimationDuration)

Fields.Name: m_FadeAnimation
Attributes: Tooltip("The animation for the vertical glow element on the platform.")

Fields.Name: m_Arrow
Attributes: Tooltip("The arrow transform, at the center of the platform.")

Fields.Name: m_TargetArrowHeight
Attributes: Tooltip("Height of the arrow transform when teleport ray hovers the teleport pad.")

Fields.Name: m_ArrowAnimationDuration
Attributes: Tooltip("Animation duration of the arrow transform to and from the target arrow height.")

Fields.Name: m_AnimationCurve
Attributes: Tooltip("Animation curve of hte arrow transform to and from the target arrow height.")

Fields.Name: m_UpdateTrackingType
Attributes: Tooltip("The time within the frame that the curve will be updated. If this Bezier Curve is attached to a transform that is updating before render, then enabling updates in Before Render will keep the line connected without delay.")

Fields.Name: m_StartPoint
Attributes: Tooltip("The transform that determines the position, handle rotation, and handle scale of the start point of the bezier curve.")

Fields.Name: m_EndPoint
Attributes: Tooltip("The transform that determines the position, handle rotation, and handle scale of the end point of the bezier curve.")

Fields.Name: m_CurveFactorStart
Attributes: Tooltip("Controls the scale factor of the curve's start bezier handle.")

Fields.Name: m_CurveFactorEnd
Attributes: Tooltip("Controls the scale factor of the curve's end bezier handle.")

Fields.Name: m_SegmentCount
Attributes: Tooltip("Controls the number of segments used to draw the curve.")

Fields.Name: m_Animate
Attributes: Tooltip("When enabled, the line color gradient will be animated so that an opaque part travels along the line.")

Fields.Name: m_AnimSpeed
Attributes: Tooltip("If animated, this controls the speed that the animation of the line.")

Fields.Name: m_GradientKeyColor
Attributes: Tooltip("If animated, this color will be the main opaque color of the gradient")

Fields.Name: m_LineRenderer
Attributes: Tooltip("The line renderer that will draw the curve. If not set it will find a line renderer on this GameObject.")

Fields.Name: m_ZTranslation
Attributes: Tooltip("How much to translate the button imagery on the z on hover.")

Fields.Name: m_LazyTooltip
Attributes: Tooltip("The tooltip Transform associated with this Callout.")

Fields.Name: m_Curve
Attributes: Tooltip("The line curve GameObject associated with this Callout.")

Fields.Name: m_DwellTime
Attributes: Tooltip("The required time to dwell on this callout before the tooltip and curve are enabled.")

Fields.Name: m_Unparent
Attributes: Tooltip("Whether the associated tooltip will be unparented on Start.")

Fields.Name: m_TurnOffAtStart
Attributes: Tooltip("Whether the associated tooltip and curve will be disabled on Start.")

Fields.Name: m_GazeTransform
Attributes: Tooltip("The transform which the forward direction will be used to evaluate as the gaze direction.")

Fields.Name: m_FacingThreshold
Attributes: Tooltip("Threshold for the dot product when determining if the Gaze Transform is facing this object. The lower the threshold, the wider the field of view.")

Fields.Name: m_FacingEntered
Attributes: Tooltip("Events fired when the Gaze Transform begins facing this game object")

Fields.Name: m_FacingExited
Attributes: Tooltip("Events fired when the Gaze Transform stops facing this game object")

Fields.Name: m_LargeMovementDistanceThreshold
Attributes: Tooltip("Distance threshold for movement in a single frame that determines a large movement that will trigger Facing Exited events.")

Fields.Name: m_LargeMovementCoolDownTime
Attributes: Tooltip("Cool down time after a large movement for Facing Entered events to fire again.")

Fields.Name: m_StartPoint
Attributes: Tooltip("The point that the project is created")

Fields.Name: m_LaunchSpeed
Attributes: Tooltip("The speed at which the projectile is launched")

Arguments.Argument: $"Ray Attach Modifier missing required Select Interactable on {name}"

Fields.Name: m_Velocity
Attributes: Tooltip("Angular velocity in degrees per second")

Fields.Name: m_Renderer
Attributes: Tooltip("The target Renderer which will display the video.")

Fields.Name: m_RenderTextureWidth
Attributes: Tooltip("The width of the RenderTexture which will be created.")

Fields.Name: m_RenderTextureHeight
Attributes: Tooltip("The height of the RenderTexture which will be created.")

Fields.Name: m_RenderTextureDepth
Attributes: Tooltip("The bit depth of the depth channel for the RenderTexture which will be created.")

Fields.Name: m_VideoTimeText
Attributes: Tooltip("Text that displays the current time of the video.")

Fields.Name: m_HideSliderAfterFewSeconds
Attributes: Tooltip("If checked, the slider will fade off after a few seconds. If unchecked, the slider will remain on.")

ReturnStatement.Statement: m_ClampedMotion ? Mathf.Lerp(m_MinAngle, m_MaxAngle, m_Value) : Mathf.LerpUnclamped(m_MinAngle, m_MaxAngle, m_Value)

Fields.Name: m_Handle
Attributes: Tooltip("The object that is visually grabbed and manipulated")

Fields.Name: m_ClampedMotion
Attributes: Tooltip("Whether this knob's rotation should be clamped by the angle limits")

Fields.Name: m_MaxAngle
Attributes: Tooltip("Rotation of the knob at value '1'")

Fields.Name: m_MinAngle
Attributes: Tooltip("Rotation of the knob at value '0'")

Fields.Name: m_AngleIncrement
Attributes: Tooltip("Angle increments to support, if greater than '0'")

Fields.Name: m_PositionTrackedRadius
Attributes: Tooltip("The position of the interactor controls rotation when outside this radius")

Fields.Name: m_OnValueChange
Attributes: Tooltip("Events to trigger when the knob is rotated")

Arguments.Argument: $"Missing Poke Follow Transform assignment on {this}. Disabling component."

Variable.Name: applyFollow
Variable.Assignment:
m_ApplyIfChildIsTarget
                ? pokeTarget != null && pokeTarget.IsChildOf(transform)
                : pokeTarget == transform

Fields.Name: m_PokeFollowTransform
Attributes:
Tooltip("Transform that will move in the poke direction when this or a parent GameObject is poked." +
                 "\nNote: Should be a direct child GameObject.")

Fields.Name: m_PokeFill
Attributes: Tooltip("Transform that will scale the mask when this interactable is poked.")

Fields.Name: m_PokeFillMaxSizeX
Attributes: Tooltip("The max width size for the poke fill image when pressed")

Fields.Name: m_PokeFillMaxSizeY
Attributes: Tooltip("The max height size for the poke fill image when pressed")

Fields.Name: m_SmoothingSpeed
Attributes: Tooltip("Multiplies transform position interpolation as a factor of Time.deltaTime. If 0, no smoothing will be applied.")

Fields.Name: m_ReturnToInitialPosition
Attributes: Tooltip("When this component is no longer the target of the poke, the Poke Follow Transform returns to the original position.")

Fields.Name: m_ApplyIfChildIsTarget
Attributes:
Tooltip("Whether to apply the follow animation if the target of the poke is a child of this transform. " +
                 "This is useful for UI objects that may have child graphics.")

Fields.Name: m_ClampToMinDistance
Attributes: Tooltip("Whether to keep the Poke Follow Transform from moving past a minimum distance from the poke target.")

Fields.Name: m_MinDistance
Attributes: Tooltip("The minimum distance from this transform that the Poke Follow Transform can move.")

Fields.Name: m_ClampToMaxDistance
Attributes: Tooltip("Whether to keep the Poke Follow Transform from moving past a maximum distance from the poke target.")

Fields.Name: m_MaxDistance
Attributes: Tooltip("The maximum distance from this transform that the Poke Follow Transform can move. Will shrink to the distance of initial position if that is smaller, or if this is 0.")
